name: Pair

aliases.name: Pair
aliases.comment: a Pair of two values of the same type

values.name: foldl
values.comment:
folds from the left over both values

    foldl (//) 1 (1,2) == 2

    foldl (::) [] (1,2) == [2,1]
values.type: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> Pair a -> b

values.name: foldr
values.comment:
folds from the right over both values

    foldr (//) 1 (1,2) == 0

    foldr (::) [] (1,2) == [1,2]
values.type: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> Pair a -> b

values.name: map
values.comment:
applies a function to both values

    map ((+) 2) (1,2) == (3,4)

values.name: map2
values.comment:
applies a function for two pairs

    map2 (+) (1,2) (3,4) == (4,6)
values.type: (a -> b -> c) -> Pair a -> Pair b -> Pair c

values.name: toList
values.comment:
returns a list with both elements

    toList(1,2) == foldr (::) [] (1,2)
